en: In the eighteenth year of Jehoshaphat king of Judah, Jehoram the son of Ahab became king over Israel in Samaria, and he reigned twelve years.
zh: 猶大王約沙法第十八年，亞哈的兒子約蘭在撒瑪利亞作王，統治以色列；他作王共有十二年。

en: He did what was evil in the sight of the LORD, though not like his father and mother, for he put away the pillar of Baal that his father had made.
zh: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，只是還不至於像他的父親和母親一樣，因為他除去了他父親所做的巴力神柱。

en: Nevertheless, he clung to the sin of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin; he did not depart from it.
zh: 只是尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷在罪中的那些罪，他卻堅持不捨，不肯脫離。

en: Now Mesha king of Moab was a sheep breeder, and he had to deliver to the king of Israel 100,000 lambs and the wool of 100,000 rams.
zh: 摩押王米沙是個以牧羊為生的人。他每年進貢十萬頭綿羊羔和十萬頭公羊羔給以色列王。

en: But when Ahab died, the king of Moab rebelled against the king of Israel.
zh: 亞哈死後，摩押王背叛以色列王。

en: So King Jehoram marched out of Samaria at that time and mustered all Israel.
zh: 那時約蘭王從撒瑪利亞出來點閱以色列眾人。

en: And he went and sent word to Jehoshaphat king of Judah, "The king of Moab has rebelled against me. Will you go with me to battle against Moab?" And he said, "I will go. I am as you are, my people as your people, my horses as your horses."
zh: 他一面起行，一面派人到猶大王約沙法那裡，說：“摩押王背叛了我，你肯不肯和我同去攻打摩押呢？”約沙法說：“我願意去；我和你不分彼此，我的人民就像是你的人民，我的馬就像是你的馬。”

en: Then he said, "By which way shall we march?" Jehoram answered, "By the way of the wilderness of Edom."
zh: 約沙法問：“我們從哪條路上去呢？”約蘭回答：“從以東曠野的路上去。”

en: So the king of Israel went with the king of Judah and the king of Edom. And when they had made a circuitous march of seven days, there was no water for the army or for the animals that followed them.
zh: 於是以色列王、猶大王和以東王，繞道行了七日的路程。軍隊和隨行的牲畜都沒有水喝。

en: Then the king of Israel said, "Alas! The LORD has called these three kings to give them into the hand of Moab."
zh: 以色列王說：“哎喲，耶和華招聚這三位君王，是要把他們交在摩押人的手中。”

en: And Jehoshaphat said, "Is there no prophet of the LORD here, through whom we may inquire of the LORD?" Then one of the king of Israel's servants answered, "Elisha the son of Shaphat is here, who poured water on the hands of Elijah."
zh: 約沙法說：“這裡不是有一位耶和華的先知嗎？我們可以託他求問耶和華。”以色列王的一位臣僕說：“這裡有沙法的兒子以利沙，他從前是服事以利亞的 。”

en: And Jehoshaphat said, "The word of the LORD is with him." So the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat and the king of Edom went down to him.
zh: 約沙法說：“他必有耶和華的話。”於是以色列王、約沙法和以東王都下到他那裡。

en: And Elisha said to the king of Israel, "What have I to do with you? Go to the prophets of your father and to the prophets of your mother." But the king of Israel said to him, "No; it is the LORD who has called these three kings to give them into the hand of Moab."
zh: 以利沙對以色列王說：“我和你有甚麼關係呢？去問你父親和你母親的先知吧！”以色列王對他說：“不要這樣說，耶和華招聚這三位君王，是要把他們交在摩押人手中。”

en: And Elisha said, "As the LORD of hosts lives, before whom I stand, were it not that I have regard for Jehoshaphat the king of Judah, I would neither look at you nor see you.
zh: 以利沙說：“我指著我所事奉永活的萬軍耶和華起誓，若不是看猶大王約沙法的情面，我根本不會理你，看也不看你。

en: But now bring me a musician." And when the musician played, the hand of the LORD came upon him.
zh: 現在，給我找一個琴師來。”當琴師彈琴的時候，耶和華的能力就臨到他身上。

en: And he said, "Thus says the LORD, 'I will make this dry streambed full of pools.'
zh: 以利沙說：“耶和華這樣說：‘要在這山谷到處挖濠溝。’

en: For thus says the LORD, 'You shall not see wind or rain, but that streambed shall be filled with water, so that you shall drink, you, your livestock, and your animals.'
zh: 因為耶和華這樣說：‘你們雖然沒有看見風，也沒有看見雨，但這山谷必充滿了水，你們和你們的牲畜都可以有水喝。

en: This is a light thing in the sight of the LORD. He will also give the Moabites into your hand,
zh: 這事在耶和華眼中算是小事，他還要把摩押交在你們手中。

en: and you shall attack every fortified city and every choice city, and shall fell every good tree and stop up all springs of water and ruin every good piece of land with stones."
zh: 你們要攻破所有堅固的城和一切繁華的都市；砍下各種佳美的樹木，堵塞所有水泉，用石頭堆滿一切肥沃的田地。’”

en: The next morning, about the time of offering the sacrifice, behold, water came from the direction of Edom, till the country was filled with water.
zh: 到了早上，約在獻祭的時候，忽然有水從以東來，遍地就滿了水。

en: When all the Moabites heard that the kings had come up to fight against them, all who were able to put on armor, from the youngest to the oldest, were called out and were drawn up at the border.
zh: 摩押全國聽見這幾位君王上來要攻打他們，就召集所有能夠穿上武裝的，不論老幼，到邊界上防守。

en: And when they rose early in phe morning and the sun shone on the water, the Moabites saw the water opposite them as red as blood.
zh: 第二天早上，他們起來的時候，太陽照在水上，摩押人從那邊看見水紅得像血一樣。

en: And they said, "This is blood; the kings have surely fought together and struck one another down. Now then, Moab, to the spoil!"
zh: 他們說：“這是血啊！一定是那些王互相攻擊，自相殘殺；現在，摩押人哪，去搶掠吧！”

en: But when they came to the camp of Israel, the Israelites rose and struck the Moabites, till they fled before them. And they went forward, striking the Moabites as they went.
zh: 他們來到以色列營，以色列人起來，擊殺摩押人，摩押人就在以色列人面前逃跑；以色列人就攻進摩押，擊殺他們。

en: And they overthrew the cities, and on every good piece of land every man threw a stone until it was covered. They stopped every spring of water and felled all the good trees, till only its stones were left in Kir-hareseth, and the slingers surrounded and attacked it.
zh: 他們毀壞城市，各人向一切肥沃的田地拋擲石頭，把田地填滿了，又堵塞一切水泉，砍下各種佳美的樹木，直到吉珥．哈列設只剩下石頭，甩石的兵把它包圍，攻擊它。

en: When the king of Moab saw that the battle was going against him, he took with him 700 swordsmen to break through, opposite the king of Edom, but they could not.
zh: 摩押王見戰事激烈，無法抵抗，於是帶領七百持刀的兵，想要突圍到以東王那裡，可是不成功，

en: Then he took his oldest son who was to reign in his place and offered him for a burnt offering on the wall. And there came great wrath against Israel. And they withdrew from him and returned to their own land.
zh: 於是他把那要接續他作王的長子，在城牆上獻為燔祭。以色列人就遭遇極大的忿怒，於是離開他，回到自己的地方去了。
